options.text: Mrs. Jué asked me to come find you.

items.speaker: Guhong
items.text: I was careless and got ambushed. Got held back... I regret having Mrs. Jué feel worried.

items.speaker: Guhong
items.text: Can you help me back to the city, Rover?

items.speaker: Guhong
items.text: I wish to tell Mrs. Jué what happened on the frontlines in person.

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "You checked your Terminal and found Guhong's contact informa..."

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You checked your Terminal and found Guhong's contact information.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: You can't help but feel a sense of unease. You make yourself stay focused and dialed the number.

dialog.stepLabel: Unknown (83): "Guhong is a Midnight Ranger, which is under the jurisdiction..."

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Guhong is a Midnight Ranger, which is under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of War.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Let's pay the Ministry of War and ask about Guhong there.
